---
title: 'Welcome to my GitHub Portfolio'
editor: visual
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">

h1.title {
text-align: center;
}

</style>
```

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
<img src="projDir/pfp.jpeg" width="175.8964" height="220"/>
:::

I am an recent Honors Finance graduate from the University of Alberta, currently working as an Analyst in the Data & Analytics department at Trust Science. My professional and academic interests lie at the intersection of economic theory, financial modeling, and applied data science.
My work in the credit industry centers around facilitating the implementation of Trust Sciences various lending products in Canada and the U.S. Using quantitative methods, I create lending strategies, monitor loan portfolio performance and economic trends, and contribute to the ongoing development of our products.

This website serves as a portfolio of my independent research.

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Contact Me</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.1.1/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
         .contact-links {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .contact-link {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: #333;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 1.1em;
        }

        .contact-link i {
            color: #009bb3;
            font-size: 1.1em;
        }

        .contact-link:hover, .contact-link:focus {
            color: #80888a;
            text-decoration: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="contact-links">
    <a class="contact-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/luketalman/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
        <i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
    </a>
    
    <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:talman@ualberta.ca">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> Email
    </a>
    
    <a class="contact-link" href="https://github.com/ltals" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
        <i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> GitHub
    </a>
</div>

</body>
</html>
```
